race.description: NATIONAL APPRENTICE RACE SERIES QTIS C1 PLATE
race.comment: BETTER SWEET (10) has been towards the tail of the field turning for home at her last two runs then sprouted wings late, most recently beaten a length over 1000m at this track. Dropping back to midweek company and gets out to this trip for the first time which is a timely move. Looks the testing material. BEREZKA (6) is consistent but finds it hard to win. Started favourite last time out and worked home well but found one better over today's distance at Doomben. Placed three from three here at 1200m so expect her to be competitive again. HAPPY BELLIE (8) last raced 53 days ago when down the track over 1400m at Randwick. Now in the Munce stable and will find this a lot easier than her recent Sydney exploits. Definite contender. REWRITE (3) resumed with a narrow win over Desanto (engaged in Race 1) over 1000m at this track last start. Sparingly raced colt with plenty more to offer. Waller brings VANESSI (9) to Queensland on the back of some solid Sydney midweek form. Should measure up.
